taxonomy: Rydingia persica is classified as a genus and species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This classification places it within the order Rosales, a group of flowering plants commonly known as the rose family. Rydingia persica is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia, where it thrives in high-altitude environments. The exact classification of Rydingia persica is still a subject of ongoing research and may be subject to revision.
